name: Bourbon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl.
2. Pour the marinade over the chicken breasts, ensuring each is evenly coated.
3. Place the chicken in a shallow dish and refrigerate, marinating overnight.
4. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
5. Bake the chicken for 1 hour and 30 minutes, basting frequently with the remaining marinade.
6. Ensure the chicken is cooked through and well browned.
7. If doubling the recipe, arrange the chicken in a single layer to ensure even cooking.
